perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) This video is a 2D animation. A bald male character and a grey-haired male character wave goodbye to each other on a residential street at night. (2) The grey-haired man walks away, turning back once to wave again with a closed-eye smile. (3) The bald character watches him leave, his expression shifting from neutral to surprised. (4) A pink cartoon 'achievement' box pops up with a baby icon. (5) The bald character looks at his smartphone screen, which displays a messaging app. (6) Close-ups of the bald character show him looking intense, sweating, and grinding his teeth while holding the phone. (7) He types a reply and a large red title card '異男忘' appears over the phone screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Two male voices exchange friendly farewells in Mandarin. Ambient suburban night sounds are audible. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect accompanies a visual pop-up. (3) Sudden dramatic, suspenseful orchestral-style music starts as the character looks at his phone. (4) One male voice provides an internal monologue, shifting from confused to intensely conflicted and resolute. (5) A digital notification 'ping' sounds. (6) A dramatic, emotional Mandopop ballad with male vocals and piano kicks in as the video reaches its climax.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'See you tomorrow then', 'Okay bye bye', 'Watch out on the road' (translated from Mandarin). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'Love Love Love' and 'Seems... a little bit like?' inside an achievement pop-up. (3) Functional Text: A message from 'Senior' (學長) saying 'Do you want to eat breakfast together tomorrow morning?'. (4) Functional Text: Character's reply 'Okay' (好ㄚ). (5) Hook Text: Large red text '異男忘' (Straight Man Crush/Forget) appearing at the end.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 bald main character, 1 grey-haired supporting character (both animated)
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An animated bald man wearing a black t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Japanese-style residential street at night with houses, fences, and streetlights.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Nighttime with artificial street lighting and smartphone screen glow.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut between ambient/dialogue and dramatic music.

vocal_qualities.tone: Shifting from friendly to intense and dramatic

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear -> Montage: Hook -> Internal Struggle -> Resolution
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To tell a comedic and relatable story about secret feelings and the internal struggle of a 'straight man crush' (異男忘). The video uses exaggerated animated expressions and dramatic music shifts to emphasize the character's nervousness and inevitable surrender to his feelings.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Creator's distinct 2D animation style (阿啾/A-Chu), specific dramatic internal monologue tropes.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video plays on a common Internet meme/slang in the Sinosphere regarding unrequited feelings for someone who might not share the same orientation.
